simulation_parameters.cost_formula: Passenger and medical emergency routing over fixed air corridors.
simulation_parameters.mission_type_note: Emergency mission means medical emergency only. Low battery and aircraft failure are aircraft states, not mission types.

nodes.name: Munich Airport
nodes.description: Airport transport hub and northern airspace entry point.

nodes.name: Munich Central Station (Hauptbahnhof)
nodes.description: Main railway hub and central passenger transfer point.

nodes.name: Ostbahnhof
nodes.description: Eastern railway hub and transfer node.

nodes.name: Pasing Bahnhof
nodes.description: Western railway hub and transfer node.

nodes.name: Arabellapark
nodes.description: Business district node in east Munich.

nodes.name: TUM Garching Campus
nodes.description: Research campus and north transit node.

nodes.name: Bogenhausen
nodes.description: Residential demand zone in east Munich.

nodes.name: Riem
nodes.description: East Munich residential and demand zone.

nodes.name: Maxvorstadt
nodes.description: Central university and residential demand zone.

nodes.name: Ismaning Transit Charging Hub
nodes.description: North transit charging hub supporting Airport-City, Garching, Allianz Arena, and Messe corridors.

nodes.name: East Munich Charging Hub
nodes.description: East Munich charging hub near Messe and Riem.
